task_description: Clean and normalize a medical records dataset containing transcription errors, inconsistent coding, and corrupted date fields from an EHR export.

input_data.context: A hospital is cleaning 60 patient visit records exported from an aging EHR system. Issues include misspelled medication names and dosages, inconsistent date formats (MM/DD/YYYY vs DD-Mon-YY vs YYYY.MM.DD with some impossible dates like 13/32/2024), ICD-10 codes mixed with ICD-9 codes, vital signs with impossible values (e.g., blood pressure 500/300, temperature 200F), free-text diagnosis fields with abbreviations and typos, duplicate visits from system glitches, and missing provider identification numbers.
